title: 8 Adhesive Dressing Pads Sterile Wound First Aid Absorbent Soft Medical Plasters
features: 8 Pack of Self Adhesive Dressing Pads.
Two Sizes Ensure the Perfect Fit for Wounds. Pack Contains 2 Sizes: Qty 4 - 75mm x 75mm and Qty 4 - 100mm x 70mm.
Suitable For Sensitive Skin. Soft, Flexible Fabric Cushions Protect Scrapes and Abrasions. Perfect for Treating Light Wounds.
Highly Absorbent, Helps Draw Exudates Away From Wounds. Excellent for Covering and Protecting Small Cuts, Surgical Wounds, Minor Burns and Grazes.
These Sterile Pads are Individually Wrap for Hygiene and Convenience. Low Adherent Dressing Pads Minimise Discomfort When Removal from Wound Area. Protective Barrier Which Allows Breathable Healing
